text: The first space feels sterile and empty, almost abandoned—its stark lighting and reflective glass amplifying a sense of distance or alienation. Upon moving into the second room, words on the display acknowledge confusion, experimentation, and collecting; I find a strange comfort in the honest embrace of uncertainty. This place, blending technology and art, feels like an invitation to be receptive, to dwell in ambiguity and reflection. I feel curious, slightly untethered, but peaceful.
